purpose: Resolve the complete ten-dimensional quadratic projector into deterministic Weiler parameter classes in the exact Novik basis, prove the conventional four-parameter ties, and fit the existing static CdTe matrices in an explicitly orthonormal repository normalization before any standard-parameter numerical claim.

normalization.name: repository_orthonormal_class_normalization
normalization.description: Each class is the deterministic unit-norm vector obtained by projecting the declared tensor-irrep and matrix-sector product basis, orthonormalizing in repository ordering, and choosing the first nonzero coefficient positive.

claim_boundary: Passing this gate names the ten established Weiler symmetry classes and reports coordinates only in an explicit repository orthonormal normalization. It does not establish the conventional Weiler numerical scale/sign normalization, converged CdTe material coefficients, novelty of the invariant algebra, finite-temperature behavior, or permission for deeper electronic-structure, phonon, HgTe, or alloy calculations.
